name: Generate Random Value
short_description: Generates a random floating-point number within a specified range, rounded to two decimal places.

inputs.name: min_val
inputs.description: Minimum value for the random number generation.

inputs.name: max_val
inputs.description: Maximum value for the random number generation.

name: Portfolio Value at Risk (VaR)
short_description: Calculates the Value at Risk (VaR) for a portfolio given its current value, daily volatility, and a specified confidence level (represented by its z-score).

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: The current market value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: volatility
inputs.description: The daily volatility of the portfolio, expressed as a percentage.

inputs.name: z_score
inputs.description: The z-score corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.65 for 95% confidence, 2.33 for 99% confidence).

name: Stock Downside Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the absolute loss in USD for a stock given its initial price and a percentage decline.

inputs.name: stock_price
inputs.description: The current price of the stock.

inputs.name: drop_percentage
inputs.description: The percentage decline in the stock price (e.g., 5 for 5%).

name: Liquidity Risk Impact: Bid-Ask Spread
short_description: Measures the additional cost incurred due to liquidity risk, calculated from a portfolio's value and its associated bid-ask spread.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: The current market value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: bid_ask_spread
inputs.description: The bid-ask spread expressed as a percentage.

name: Option Vega Volatility Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the expected change in an option's value due to a change in the underlying asset's volatility, using the option's vega.

inputs.name: vega
inputs.description: Option's vega, representing the change in option value per 1% change in volatility.

inputs.name: vol_change
inputs.description: Change in the underlying asset's volatility, expressed in percentage points.

name: Multi-Factor Portfolio Risk Impact
short_description: Calculates the total risk impact on a portfolio considering multiple risk factors, their weights, sensitivities, and changes.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Total value of the portfolio

inputs.name: w1
inputs.description: Weight of factor 1 in the portfolio (in %)

inputs.name: w2
inputs.description: Weight of factor 2 in the portfolio (in %)

inputs.name: w3
inputs.description: Weight of factor 3 in the portfolio (in %)

inputs.name: s1
inputs.description: Sensitivity of portfolio to factor 1

inputs.name: s2
inputs.description: Sensitivity of portfolio to factor 2

inputs.name: s3
inputs.description: Sensitivity of portfolio to factor 3

inputs.name: fc1
inputs.description: Change in factor 1 (in %)

inputs.name: fc2
inputs.description: Change in factor 2 (in %)

inputs.name: fc3
inputs.description: Change in factor 3 (in %)
